name: Spice Yogurt Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. MARINADE: Combine the yogurt, lime juice, ginger, garlic and spices in a bowl and mix well. Place chicken in marinade and stir to coat. Refrigerate it for 2 to 8 hours.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Arrange the chicken in a large/shallow dish, leaving no more than 1 inch of space between them.
3. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. Spread the marinade mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake until meat feels firm to the touch. Time will depend on piece used; breasts will take less than thighs.
6. Arrange on platter with lime slices. This dish is very creamy and feels like you are eating a rich sauce.
Note: Calories: 273; Protein: 31g; Cholesterol: 102 mg; Total fat 13g; Sodium: 135mg.
